title: Cronos Group Inc.: Target Price Consensus and Analysts Recommendations
text: Cronos Group Inc. target price consensus and analyst recommendations. The average analyst price target provides consensus expectations for stock appreciation or depreciation. Multiple analyst recommendations ranging from buy to sell ratings are aggregated. On the Canadian listing, average price target from 9 analysts is 4.67 CAD, with expected price increase of 30.59% in next year. On the U.S. listing, consensus estimates vary by source, with some showing average one-year price target of $3.64. Forecasts range from lows of $3.60 to highs of $3.75. Another consensus source reports average price target of $2.30 based on analyst's 12-month price target, suggesting downside risk. Buy percentage consensus is at 82, suggesting analysts are very confident about the stock.
